channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Someone Finally Took a Good iPhone Photo of the Moon. Good Luck Copying Their Trick
item.description: Amateur photographers have been trying to figure this out for years, but NASA came up with a cool hack.

item.title: Intelligence artificielle | Anthropic entrevoit un chiffre d’affaires supérieur à son rival OpenAI
item.description: Anthropic, créatrice du modèle d’IA générative Claude, a annoncé lundi une croissance « exponentielle » de ses revenus, multipliés par trois en un trimestre, au point de revendiquer pour la première fois un chiffre d’affaires annualisé supérieur à celui de son grand rival OpenAI, maison mère de ChatGPT.

item.title: Waymo is set to launch its London pilot this month, here’s what you need to know
item.description: Waymo’s driverless taxis are making their way to London starting with a pilot starting in April 2026.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for April 7, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for April 7, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for April 7, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1753 on April 7 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: In Letter, OpenAI Reportedly Says Elon Musk and Meta Are Coordinating ‘Attacks’ Against It
item.description: The letter to the attorneys general of Delaware and California asks for an investigation into Musk.
